name: github-local-ops
summary: Use local GitHub CLI authentication and git state for repository, PR, CI, issue, release, and publishing workflows.
purpose: Use this plugin when Codex needs GitHub evidence or GitHub write previews from the local machine, especially when the hosted connector is unavailable or when local git state matters.
whenToUse: Inspect repositories, pull requests, review threads, checks, workflow runs, issues, releases, or search results.
Prepare commits, pushes, draft pull requests, reviewer-ready PR bodies, or release notes.
Debug GitHub Actions using local gh authentication and provider-style readbacks.
Preview public GitHub writes before asking for explicit approval.

safety.authModel: Uses existing gh CLI authentication and local git configuration.
safety.writeModel: The bundled MCP manifest enables preview-owned execution; mutation previews produce approval tokens and exact commands before execution.

installNotes: Requires gh and git on the target machine.
Run setup/status before provider writes or account-sensitive reads.
Custom MCP launchers must pass --enable-public-writes, or set GITHUB_LOCAL_OPS_ENABLE_PUBLIC_WRITES=true outside chat, before github_mutation_execute can apply an approved preview.
